The deadlock issue is likely due to inconsistent lock ordering. Looking at the `generate_subframe` function, I can see that inside the loop, it calls `instance->mac->pop_rx_buffer()` which locks the mutex, and then later calls `instance->mac->release_mac_pdu(pdu)` which also locks the same mutex.
